name: Don't Blame the Large Language Model: How Agent Harness Evolution Shapes Coding Agent Quality
summary: arXiv:2607.03691v2 Announce Type: replace-cross Abstract: Coding agents, autonomous systems that use large language models (LLMs) to resolve software engineering tasks, rely on agent harness: a mid...
description: arXiv:2607.03691v2 Announce Type: replace-cross Abstract: Coding agents, autonomous systems that use large language models (LLMs) to resolve software engineering tasks, rely on agent harness: a middleware layer in between a developer and a large language model that orchestrates system prompts, tool execution, context management, and iterative reasoning loops. While these agent harnesses evolve...
author: Oussama Ben Sghaier, Hao Li, Bram Adams, Ahmed E. Hassan
